title: Ruined Worlds (DISCONTINUED)
description: A mod that adds new mystery and structures to the game!
body:
Ready to go through the history of this new Ruined World? Discover this new world and find its secrets. ![Mod Header](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1023963908949680250/1156923171258257408/ce32a5a1673a9d8cb3cb9eb03fa529b1e96de6e5.png?ex=651764ea&is=6516136a&hm=7fcdbe8acdf4767a8dfde085a21cbdb1a98ee5238b9a8f4ca1ba58d86864a468&) Ruined Worlds is a Minecraft mod that adds new armor & tools, a new mob and around 10 new structures to the game. This goes from campsite to a whole new underground settlement. Discover the world with its many secrets and try to survive the darkness that's hiding. ### Armor & Tools A new **very rare** ore has been introduced, called Robium. It can be found in the overworld, but it's difficult to deal with. You can make armor and tools out of it, which are stronger than Netherrite. The armor even gives you a few buffs. However, you'll need to kill the Shadowmelder to craft a specific item in order to make the armor work. ### The Mobs There is a new mob called the Shadowmelder which will roam the areas of the Vault. It's a shadowy being, corrupted by Robium. Only it's eyes will have color. It's fast and strong so be prepared for a hunt. ### Structures The mod adds 10 new structures to the game. These are the: Campsite 1, Campsite 2, Abandoned Gas Station, Abandoned Bus Station, Buried Chest, Buried Shelter, Moos Statue, Ruined Gate, Seller's House and the Vault. ## Translations
Translators of the mod - German/Deutsch Translation: ieguana
- Dutch/Nederlands: JoasJSD
You can report bugs, glitches or other problems at Github, but we might be able to help better on our Discord server! https://discord.gg/K7Cgqx7drZ
